title: Yarden #3383
definition:
Jordan = "descender"

 1) the river of Palestine running from the roots of Anti-Lebanon to
    the Dead Sea a distance of approx 200 miles (320 km)
nasbUsage:
Definition: Jordan = "descender"

 1) the river of Palestine running from the roots of Anti-Lebanon to
    the Dead Sea a distance of approx 200 miles (320 km)

    NASB:  the principal river of Pal.
